overall.description: A first-person exploration through a steampunk Victorian city at sunset, transitioning from narrow exterior streets with overgrown red foliage to the ornate interior of the Clockwork Mansion. The player navigates through tight alleyways, emerges onto a scenic mountain overlook, and enters a grand hall with double staircases before approaching a mechanical clockwork soldier.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow cobblestone street flanked by tall Victorian buildings. A green building covered in red foliage dominates the left side while an ornate white building rises on the right. The space is tight and enclosed with only partial sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with wooden platform and mountain vista

events.description: camera turns right to follow the wooden track pathway toward the vista
sunlight becomes more intense as camera faces the setting sun over mountains

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden overlook platform toward the scenic vista

entered.detail: wooden shelter structure covering part of the overlook platform
old-fashioned carriage on wooden tracks under the canopy
distant mountain range with steep cliffs visible in the background
distant city visible in the valley below the overlook

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide wooden overlook platform with a vintage carriage resting on tracks under a wooden canopy. The camera moves toward a stunning vista of distant mountains and a city below, bathed in golden hour sunlight.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the Clockwork Mansion through a narrow hallway lined with wood paneling and illuminated wolf statues. A red carpet leads forward past glass display cases toward a distant doorway, with warm artificial lighting from wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand mansion hall with double staircases and balconies

clockwork soldier activates and stands in the center of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a magnificent grand hall with soaring brass pillars and symmetrical double staircases. The space features red walls, upper balconies, and display cases. As the camera explores the space, a mechanical clockwork soldier stands prominently at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a Victorian street into the expansive, ornate interior of a mechanical mansion. It begins by navigating a narrow cobblestone alley flanked by tall buildings and red foliage, where the view is tightly enclosed. As the camera emerges from the street, the scene opens onto a wide wooden overlook platform featuring a vintage carriage, revealing a vast vista of distant mountains and a city bathed in golden hour sunlight. The perspective then shifts inward, passing through a wood-paneled hallway lined with illuminated wolf statues and a red carpet before entering a magnificent grand hall. Finally, the space expands into a soaring chamber of brass pillars and symmetrical double staircases, where the camera moves toward a mechanical clockwork soldier standing prominently at the top of the stairs.
